title: LadderWarp
description: Instantly warp up and down climbable blocks with just a right-click.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/awxrVrt.png "")
# LadderWarp

LadderWarp is a very light mod that allows you to instantly warp up and down climbable blocks with just a right-click.

Works on ladders, vines, scafollding, weeping vines, twisting vines, and even modded climbable blocks.

## Video

[![](http://img.youtube.com/vi/9-G-_OzK-Iw/0.jpg)](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9-G-_OzK-Iw "")

 

![Requires Fabric](https://i.imgur.com/xjLwA3L.png "Requires Fabric")
